name: David Ayres' Lowcountry Custom Golf
address: 1137 Johnnie Dodds Blvd, Mt Pleasant, SC 29464
about: David Ayres' Lowcountry Custom Golf is a premier club fitting and golf instruction center in Charleston, SC, specializing in custom equipment and expert coaching. The venue utilizes advanced technology, including Foresight Sports Quad and GC2 Launch Monitors, to provide precise club fittings and lessons tailored to each golfer's swing. With a focus on personalized service, they offer one-on-one lessons for adults, youth, and all skill levels, as well as club repair services. Their independence from any single manufacturer ensures unbiased recommendations to maximize a player's performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Foresight Sports Quad and GC2 Launch Monitors for precise fittings
Unbiased club recommendations independent of any single brand
One-on-one lessons with experienced instructors for all skill levels
Comprehensive club repair services completed within 48 hours

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor for club fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available for $60 per set, with an additional $25 per day. You can also bring your own clubs for fittings or lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services on-site, so it's unclear if outside food or drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator round. Lessons are one hour long, but simulator time for full rounds is not detailed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers youth lessons for those aged 10 and older, making it kid-friendly for junior golfers.
